name: Chocolate Chip Bread
recipeInstructions:
-------------
Combine the first 10 ingredients in a large bowl. Add the chocolate chips and mix until evenly distributed. Pour into a greased loaf pan, select white bread setting, and start the machine. The beeper will signal when it is done mixing for about 5 minutes. Remove from the machine and turn the darkness control slightly towards light to avoid overcooking the chips. This bread has a cake-like texture.
